title: Skill Compiler Beta Feedback
description: Feedback form for Skill Compiler beta testers. Collects the Would Use gate metric and qualitative ratings.

would_use.description: The Phase 1 Gate metric. Would you use the Skill Compiler as part of your regular workflow?

compilation_quality.description: How well did the compiler extract and structure the execution graph? (1 = poor, 5 = excellent)

parameter_accuracy.description: How accurate was parameter detection? Did it find the right values to parameterize? (1 = poor, 5 = excellent)

ui_ease_of_use.description: How easy was the compilation review page to understand and use? (1 = confusing, 5 = intuitive)

missing_features.description: What features or capabilities are missing that would make you say yes to the Would Use question?

bugs_found.description: Describe any bugs, errors, or unexpected behavior you encountered during testing.

agent_used.description: Which agent(s) did you test the compiler with?
